'''âch-t-ch''' ('''shachatach''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:myspace|myspace]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-t-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:myspace|myspace]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âch-t-ch
|-
! Lemma
| shachatach
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thichatach|thichatach]] || [[word:jichatach|jichatach]] || [[word:shichatach|shichatach]] || [[word:kichatach|kichatach]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuchatach|thuthuchatach]] || [[word:jujuchatach|jujuchatach]] || [[word:shushuchatach|shushuchatach]] || [[word:kukuchatach|kukuchatach]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuchatach|thuchatach]] || [[word:juchatach|juchatach]] || [[word:shuchatach|shuchatach]] || [[word:kuchatach|kuchatach]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuchatach|thuchatach]] || [[word:juchatach|juchatach]] || [[word:shuchatach|shuchatach]] || [[word:kuchatach|kuchatach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thechatach|thechatach]] || [[word:jechatach|jechatach]] || [[word:shechatach|shechatach]] || [[word:kechatach|kechatach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothochatach|thothochatach]] || [[word:jojochatach|jojochatach]] || [[word:shoshochatach|shoshochatach]] || [[word:kokochatach|kokochatach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thochatach|thochatach]] || [[word:jochatach|jochatach]] || [[word:shochatach|shochatach]] || [[word:kochatach|kochatach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thochatach|thochatach]] || [[word:jochatach|jochatach]] || [[word:shochatach|shochatach]] || [[word:kochatach|kochatach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠchatach|thĂŠchatach]] || [[word:jĂŠchatach|jĂŠchatach]] || [[word:shĂŠchatach|shĂŠchatach]] || [[word:kĂŠchatach|kĂŠchatach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathachatach|thathachatach]] || [[word:jajachatach|jajachatach]] || [[word:shashachatach|shashachatach]] || [[word:kakachatach|kakachatach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thachatach|thachatach]] || [[word:jachatach|jachatach]] || [[word:shachatach|shachatach]] || [[word:kachatach|kachatach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thachatach|thachatach]] || [[word:jachatach|jachatach]] || [[word:shachatach|shachatach]] || [[word:kachatach|kachatach]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shachatach|shachatach]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshachatach|goshachatach]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishachatach|gokishachatach]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shachatachnĂŒ|shachatachnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshachatachnknĂŒ|goshachatachnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishachatachnĂŒ|gokishachatachnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shachatachshĂ«|shachatachshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshachatachnkshĂ«|goshachatachnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishachatachshĂ«|gokishachatachshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shachatachro|shachatachro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshachatachnkro|goshachatachnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishachatachro|gokishachatachro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shachatachmu|shachatachmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshachatachnkmu|goshachatachnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishachatachmu|gokishachatachmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shachatachsher|shachatachsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshachatachnksher|goshachatachnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishachatachsher|gokishachatachsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shachatachng|shachatachng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshachatachnkng|goshachatachnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishachatachng|gokishachatachng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shachatachya|shachatachya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshachatachnkya|goshachatachnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishachatachya|gokishachatachya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shachatachyam|shachatachyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshachatachnkyam|goshachatachnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishachatachyam|gokishachatachyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shachatachnĂŒshĂ«|shachatachnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshachatachnknĂŒshĂ«|goshachatachnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishachatachnĂŒshĂ«|gokishachatachnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shachatachnĂŒro|shachatachnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshachatachnknĂŒro|goshachatachnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishachatachnĂŒro|gokishachatachnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shachatachnĂŒmu|shachatachnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshachatachnknĂŒmu|goshachatachnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishachatachnĂŒmu|gokishachatachnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shachatachshĂ«nĂŒ|shachatachshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshachatachnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshachatachnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishachatachshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishachatachshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shachatachshĂ«ro|shachatachshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshachatachnkshĂ«ro|goshachatachnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishachatachshĂ«ro|gokishachatachshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shachatachshĂ«mu|shachatachshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshachatachnkshĂ«mu|goshachatachnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishachatachshĂ«mu|gokishachatachshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shachatachronĂŒ|shachatachronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshachatachnkronĂŒ|goshachatachnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishachatachronĂŒ|gokishachatachronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shachatachroshĂ«|shachatachroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshachatachnkroshĂ«|goshachatachnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishachatachroshĂ«|gokishachatachroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shachatachromu|shachatachromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshachatachnkromu|goshachatachnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishachatachromu|gokishachatachromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shachatachmunĂŒ|shachatachmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshachatachnkmunĂŒ|goshachatachnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishachatachmunĂŒ|gokishachatachmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shachatachmushĂ«|shachatachmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshachatachnkmushĂ«|goshachatachnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishachatachmushĂ«|gokishachatachmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shachatachmuro|shachatachmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshachatachnkmuro|goshachatachnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishachatachmuro|gokishachatachmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5390c6a}}
